series_metadata.series_title: Analytical Toxicoloy Lab (ATL) Obsolete Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)
series_metadata.series_description: Obsolete Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) are defined as SOPs that have been revised and have been replaced by a new revision. The obsolete revision is retained for reference purposes. The Quality Assurance Coordinator is the record retention coordinator.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: 5 years ; Electronic: 5 years, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
